step_rationale: HDL-resident esterase protecting against LDL oxidation; reduced in ACS.
mechanism: PON1 is an HDL-associated esterase that hydrolyzes oxidized phospholipids in LDL, preventing lipid-core accumulation and plaque inflammation.
